summary: Frontend Admin Panel Refactoring Test Complete. All admin pages load correctly with modular structure. Collapsible sidebar with navigation works on desktop. Mobile responsive menu drawer opens/closes correctly. Sidebar highlights active page. 2FA authentication flow working (redirects to /admin/login when not authenticated, OTP sent on valid credentials).

issues: Duplicate data-testid attributes on nav items (both desktop and mobile sidebars have same testid) - minor but could cause issues in automated testing

Admin Layout with Collapsible Sidebar./admin: PASSED - Renders correctly, loads overview page
Admin Layout with Collapsible Sidebar.data-testid attributes: PASSED - All nav items have data-testid for testing

Admin Authentication.Login form: PASSED - Email and PIN fields visible
Admin Authentication.2FA flow: PASSED - OTP sent on valid credentials, verification page shown

Admin Pages (All 9 Pages)./admin (Overview): PASSED - Dashboard with stats cards, recent orders
Admin Pages (All 9 Pages)./admin/orders: PASSED - Orders table with search, filters, status management
Admin Pages (All 9 Pages)./admin/users: PASSED - User list with tabs (All Users, User Rewards)
Admin Pages (All 9 Pages)./admin/marketing: PASSED - Discount codes, coupon usage, abandoned carts, gift codes tabs
Admin Pages (All 9 Pages)./admin/content: PASSED - Reviews, Blog, Subscribers, Instagram tabs
Admin Pages (All 9 Pages)./admin/inventory: PASSED - Inventory table with stock management
Admin Pages (All 9 Pages)./admin/inquiries: PASSED - Inquiry list with detail panel
Admin Pages (All 9 Pages)./admin/settings: PASSED - Account info, change PIN, logout

Sidebar Navigation.Navigation works: PASSED - All links navigate to correct pages
Sidebar Navigation.Active page highlighting: PASSED - Current page highlighted in sidebar
Sidebar Navigation.Badge counts: PASSED - Inquiries badge shows pending count (2)

Mobile Responsive.Mobile sidebar navigation items: PASSED - All 9 navigation items visible in drawer

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Admin panel successfully refactored from single 3159-line file to 10 modular files
✓ AdminLayout.jsx handles sidebar (desktop/mobile), auth checks, stats fetching
✓ All page components use useOutletContext() for shared authFetch and stats
✓ Routing correctly configured in App.js with nested routes under /admin
✓ Legacy /admin-old route preserved for backwards compatibility
✓ Sidebar collapse state persists within session
✓ Mobile menu closes automatically on navigation (useEffect on location.pathname)
MINOR: Nav items have same data-testid on both desktop and mobile sidebars - consider adding unique ids like nav-orders-desktop and nav-orders-mobile

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 9 admin pages load correctly, navigation works, mobile responsive

admin_user.note: Requires 2FA OTP - created test session manually for UI testing

seed_data_creation: Created admin session in user_sessions collection for testing
